content.en:
Source Sea.

One by one, the Peak Legendary Realm Lords came, and most of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords didn't dare to snatch the treasure land here, after all, this was the territory of the Endless Lord Ye Tian.

But that doesn't mean that no one dares to occupy it, if this treasure land is indeed precious enough, those fourth-level peak Legendary Realm lords are afraid that they will snatch it.

Because in the eyes of outsiders, Ye Tian's strength still stopped at the peak of the third level Legendary Realm Lord.

After all, in the Void Region, Ye Tian hadn't made a move to show his strength for a long time, and the fact that he went to the Boundary River through the Eternal Hall was only known to a few peak Legendary Realm lords.

The Border Lord, the Sword One Lord, and the third-level peak Legendary Realm Lord are here.

And the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord also came - Lord Lei Yan!

Lord Lei Yan didn't know Ye Tian's strength, although he went to cross the Boundary River, his clone in the Boundary River fell, and he couldn't go out again in the short "200" room, so he could only wait for the opportunity.

Therefore, he didn't know the information in the boundary river at all.

If he knew Ye Tian's strength, where would he dare to come here!

At this time, a special place emerged in a certain area of the Source Sea, and a special energy was permeating this place, and this energy fluctuation was too strong, sweeping the entire Source Sea, and even spreading to the surrounding territories.

Because of this, they will be the first to know.

"This newborn treasure land is probably the top treasure land in the Void Region, and it is qualified to be included in the top twenty!"

Lord Lei Yan muttered.

He was interested in such a treasure land.

He can't enter the Boundary River at the moment, so he can only rely on the treasure land of the Void Region to improve his strength.

Therefore, he did not want to let go of any opportunity.

As for offending the Endless Lord here because of this, he didn't care.

"This treasure land, I want it from Lei Yan!"

Lord Lei Yan spoke.

For a moment, none of the other peak Legendary Realm lords dared to refute.

There is no way, Lord Lei Yan is the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the fourth level, and his strength is far above them, how dare they refute it!

Even no matter how strong the Frontier Lord was, he had not stepped into the fourth level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord realm, so he did not dare to refute the Lei Yan Lord.

Just as Lord Lei Yan was about to step into the interior of this treasure land, a voice came, resounding through endless time and space, and everyone heard it clearly.

"Lord Lei Yan, this treasure land belongs to my human race, you better leave. "

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian came.

Lord Lei Yan didn't see through Ye Tian's cultivation, because his will was only a half-step eighth order, far from reaching the level of the eighth order, just like many peak Legendary Realm lords couldn't see through the cultivation of the white-bearded old man.

Unless it is the other party who deliberately shows his cultivation, he will be quickly seen through.

With Xin Yan Tian slightly hiding his aura, Lord Lei Yan couldn't see through Ye Tian's strength.

Therefore, Lord Lei Yan instinctively thought that Ye Tian's strength was on the same level as the border lord, and he couldn't look down on it at all.

So, Lord Lei Yan said in a cold voice, "Endless Lord, are you going to stop me?"

"You want to occupy my territory, what do you say?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"Look for death!"

Lord Lei Yan was annoyed.

He wants to destroy Ye Tian's clone and teach Ye Tian a lesson.

Rumble!!!!

A Thunder Flame Dragon erupted from the Thunder Flame Lord's body, shattering the momentum of time and space.

This is Lord Lei Yan's time-space supreme technique-Lei Yan True Dragon Technique, and it is also the time-space supreme skill that he became famous, and its power is very terrifying.

However.

This Thunder Flame Dragon rushed into Ye Tian's face, and Ye Tian just gently stretched out a hand and pressed it on the Thunder Flame Dragon's head.

Bang.

The Thunder Flame Dragon dissipated and turned into nothingness.

And Ye Tian didn't even move his body, this space-time supreme technique that was extremely powerful enough to kill the third-level peak Legendary Realm Lord was like paper paste in Ye Tian's hands.

"This ......"

Lord Lei Yan was stunned, and the other peak Legendary Realm lords were also dumbfounded, the difference in strength between the two sides was very big at a glance.

"The Endless Lord is not the third-level peak Legendary Realm Lord!"

The border lord said secretly.

He guessed in his heart that Ye Tian had surpassed himself, but he didn't expect Ye Tian's strength to be even stronger than Lord Lei Yan.

However, in his opinion, Ye Tian should be the top fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

As for the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, he didn't dare to imagine it, because the span was too big.

"Lord Lei Yan, this time I will destroy one of your clones as a warning!" As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian made a move.

He directly used the space-time control technique of the Three Thousand Void Hands, which was also the first time he used this space-time control technique against others, and also served as an experiment..........

In fact, he didn't need to cast three thousand Void Hands, just those half-step space-time control techniques could kill the Thunder Flame Lord in an instant.

However, he wanted to completely intimidate the Quartet, so that no one would disturb him.

Rumble!!!!

In the void, three thousand purple giant hands instantly bombarded the body of Lord Lei Yan, no matter how strong his defense was and how many life-saving things there were, in an instant, this clone was shattered by Ye Tian and turned into ashes.

Under one blow, the clone of Lord Lei Yan completely fell.

Void Zone.

Thor Mountains.

Lord Lei Yan's body is practicing here, and at this moment, his body trembled, knowing that his clone had been killed by Ye Tian in seconds, and he trembled.

"Ye Tian is a fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, how could this be, why did his strength improve so quickly?"

Lord Lei Yan couldn't believe it.

Soon, he guessed the approximate reason.

Ye Tian must have gone to the Boundary River, only in the Boundary River can there be many opportunities, to be able to make Ye Tian ascend so quickly, in the Void Region, it is absolutely impossible to easily ascend to such a level.

"Ye Tian is afraid that he has joined the Eternal Palace, so he can't offend him!"

Lord Lei Yan confessed, this time the clone was killed, so he could only admit it.

Otherwise, if he really wants to offend Ye Tian, even his body will be killed, and then he will really fall completely.

Source Sea.

Ye Tian blasted and killed the clone of the Lei Yan Lord, shocking the other peak Legendary Realm Lords.

1.3 At this time, the eyes of the other peak Legendary Realm Lords looking at Ye Tian were full of awe.

Immediately, they said they would not have any thoughts about the treasure.

Then, these peak Legendary Realm lords left one by one, and the border lords also left.

At this time, the Immortal Lord of the True Saintless Land walked over and asked, "Endless Lord, what realm is your strength in, that even the Lord of Thunder Flame can be killed?"

Ye Tian said lightly: "Fifth level peak Legendary Realm Lord!"

"Hiss!!"

The Word Lord gasped.

Compared to Ye Tian, she is too ordinary.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian still needed to look up to her, but now she doesn't even have the qualifications to look up to Ye Tian.

Fortunately, Ye Tian was the Legendary Realm Lord of the True Saintless Land, and the stronger Ye Tian was, the more benefits he would have for her.

And after this time, the reputation of the True Void Holy Land will inevitably rise. _
